title: Content Type Union
description: Union vocabulary for content-type labels emitted by Courseforge on sections, callouts, and by Trainforge on chunks. Union-only per REC-VOC-03 — NOT enforced as a single field anywhere yet; each subtype is scoped to its emission site.
$comment: SectionContentType lifted from Courseforge/scripts/generate_course.py:388-405 (_infer_content_type return values: definition, example, procedure, comparison, exercise, overview, summary, explanation). CalloutContentType lifted from Courseforge/scripts/generate_course.py:448 (data-cf-content-type values on div.callout: application-note, note). ChunkType lifted from Trainforge/process_course.py:1372-1397 (_type_from_resource + _type_from_heading return values). Per REC-VOC-03 (union-only, not enforcement yet).

SectionContentType.description: Content-type labels emitted on Courseforge <h2>/<h3> via data-cf-content-type (_infer_content_type returns).

CalloutContentType.description: Content-type labels emitted on Courseforge <div class="callout"> via data-cf-content-type.

ChunkType.description: Content-type labels emitted on Trainforge chunks (chunk_type field), union of _type_from_resource and _type_from_heading return values.

ContentType.description: Discriminated union of all content-type vocabularies. Consumers pick the specific subtype for their emission site.
